request.description:
List triage actions for an organization. Results are paginated and can be sorted by created_at or updated_at.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- triage:alerts-list

query.description: Set to true to force broad triage updates, these are triages lacking a specific alertKey or granular artifact information which may have limited introspection to see what they apply to.

request.description:
Create or update triage actions on organization alerts. Accepts a batch of triage entries. Omit `uuid` to create a new entry; provide an existing `uuid` to update it. Use `?force=true` for broad triages that lack a specific `alertKey` or granular package information.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- triage:alerts-update

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Set to true to force broad triage updates, these are triages lacking a specific alertKey or granular artifact information which may have limited introspection to see what they apply to.
